min SoC BAP frame — change in head unit e-Manager, diff vs idle
UDS ign-on retry @ 500k+1M for all ECU addrs (ISO-TP std + VW TP2.0 + 7DF + 200/200)
schedule-trig clima: different BAP signaling, same port 0x12 stop detect
charge start/stop — min SoC 0%<->100%, diff vs idle
folded into cap 8; frame structure confirmed in can3-…-20260413-121648.md

sustained regen coast — disambig torque vs power for 0x0B4 (b3,b4)
WOT accel — confirm MotorTorqueB on fwd load, check sign byte
clima verify deferred path: locked >=30s, start (wake + ~1s gap -> BAP), 10s, stop (NM linger + ACK ctr match) — 20260422 (4 caps)
clima verify direct path: unlock+door (bus awake), start (immediate BAP, no wake), 10s, stop — 20260422 (in same set as cap 18)

CCS DC charge mid-session — `…-132333` (533 s of 1426 s, truncated by module reset); 0x594 broadcasts on KCAN during DC (CType=2 confirmed first 1.9 s, then bit layout shifts); 0x131 SoC pinned during DC (real 49→92 %, bus byte[3] decodes 74.5→89.0 %); 0x191 silent (0 frames); 0x1A5554A8 DC-only mux IDs 0x3,0x4,0x7,0x8,0xD,0xE,0xF observed but only 2-9 frames each (~0.2 Hz vs AC 2 Hz) — NEEDS untruncated capture

driving validation — `…-143106` (Hälla→E18→R66→OKQ8, 9 m 37 s in B-mode); 0x131 SoC tracks fine on FCAN drive (99.0→95.0 % monotonic); 0x191 decode validated (peak −105.5 kW / +22.5 kW regen, integral −1.706 kWh); 0x2AF DBC decode WRONG (b4-b7 static zero; b2-b3 LE 16-bit cumulative ~mWh hyp, 26 wraps + 58496 ≈ 1762 Wh vs 1706 Wh integral, ~3 % match); 0x6B4 VIN assembly confirmed; gross SoC includes ~7 pp top buffer vs displayed
OBC 0x569 confirmed: d[4]=AC V 1V/bit (248V/0xf8); d[5]=AC A 1A/bit (9A); d[1]b6=charging-active; 2232W sustained; full AC session (Type 1 J1772 cable) — 20260429 (from PR #2 / @PMKA, JDM e-Golf)
